relationship_to_wave39: Independent mechanism registry. Wave39 uses absolute dollar imbalance and price efficiency. Wave40 uses the transition from the completed pre-boundary clock to the first post-boundary clock and disagreement between trade-count and dollar-weighted direction.

data_separation.rule: One Wave40 candidate may be frozen from 2022. No 2023 outcome is opened before that freeze. Wave39 outcomes or candidate rankings are not Wave40 inputs.

official_inputs.source: checksum-verified Binance USD-M aggTrades and one-minute contract/funding archives
official_inputs.decision_clock: the selected post-boundary 10-second window must be complete
official_inputs.pre_boundary_clock: the final completed 60 seconds before the boundary
official_inputs.post_boundary_clock: the first completed 10 seconds after the boundary
official_inputs.missing_policy: no imputation; any prior feature history or still-open holding path intersecting a missing official minute is invalid

families.mechanism: Aggressive flow remains extreme with the same sign across the quarter-hour boundary and price accepts the new-clock flow; scheduled inventory transfer continues.
The first post-boundary flow reverses an extreme pre-boundary imbalance and price accepts the new sign; the scheduling clock marks an inventory regime switch.

Dollar-weighted imbalance is extreme, trade-count imbalance is materially weaker, and top-five trade concentration is high; a small number of large aggressive orders carry information and price follows them.
Concentrated large-dollar aggression produces weak or opposite first-10-second price response, indicating passive absorption.
Trade-count imbalance is extreme but dollar-weighted imbalance is weak or opposite, indicating many small aggressors without large-dollar confirmation.

causal_thresholds.estimation: trailing 60 calendar days of completed prior boundaries, shifted one boundary
forbidden: future returns or MFE/MAE in entry rules

execution.entry: first official one-minute open after the complete 10-second decision clock
execution.intrabar_rule: stop first; gaps fill at the adverse open
execution.funding: actual historical rate with conservative exact-exit ordering

development_gate.selection_score: minimum fold growth, then 32bp total growth, then lower winner concentration
